series_metadata.series_description: The purpose of these files is to provide ready reference and information for active agreements. A) File contains supporting documents such as right-of-way, utilities, other agencies including Army Engineers, private, etc., relating to all agreements mentioned in this paragraph. B) Copy or original in Director's or Real Estate Office.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain until 2 years after expiration of agreements and then destroy., Paper: Wastepaper
